name: Quick Powder

name: Metal Powder
description: An item to be held by Ditto. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts the Defense stat.

name: Deep Sea Scale
description: An item to be held by Clamperl. This scale shines with a faint pink and raises the holder’s Sp. Def stat.

description: Imported from Shops, Stores & Trash Cans (XY).xlsx; review final in-game description later.

name: TM50 [Overheat]
description: Imported from Shops, Stores & Trash Cans (XY).xlsx; review final in-game description later.

name: Friend Ball
description: A strange Poké Ball that will make the wild Pokémon caught with it more friendly toward you immediately.

name: TM68 [Giga Impact]
description: Imported from Shops, Stores & Trash Cans (XY).xlsx; review final in-game description later.

name: Zinc
description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. When consumed, it raises the base Sp. Def stat of a single Pokémon.

name: Relic Band
description: A heavy bracelet made by an ancient civilization about 3,000 years ago.

name: Premier Ball
description: A somewhat rare Poké Ball that was made as a commemorative item used to celebrate an event of some sort.

name: Full Heal
description: A spray-type medicine that is broadly effective. It can be used once to heal all the status conditions of a Pokémon.

name: Revive
description: A medicine that can revive fainted Pokémon. It also restores half of a fainted Pokémon’s maximum HP.

name: Full Restore
description: A medicine that can be used to fully restore the HP of a single Pokémon and heal any status conditions it has.

name: Tamato Berry
description: A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. Using it on a Pokémon makes it more friendly but lowers its base Speed.

name: Swift Wing
description: An item for use on a Pokémon. It slightly increases the base Speed stat of a single Pokémon.

name: TM51 [Heavy Slam]
description: Imported from Shops, Stores & Trash Cans (XY).xlsx; review final in-game description later.

name: Lure Ball
description: A Poké Ball that is good for catching Pokémon that you reel in with a Rod while out fishing.

name: Carbos
description: A nutritious drink for Pokémon. When consumed, it raises the base Speed stat of a single Pokémon.

name: Max Revive
description: A medicine that can revive fainted Pokémon. It also fully restores a fainted Pokémon’s maximum HP.

name: Sitrus Berry
description: A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a Pokémon holds one, it can restore its own HP by a small amount during battle.

name: Moomoo Milk
description: A bottle of highly nutritious milk. When consumed, it restores 100 HP to an injured Pokémon.

name: TM52 [Focus Blast]
description: Imported from Shops, Stores & Trash Cans (XY).xlsx; review final in-game description later.

name: Level Ball
description: A Poké Ball that makes it easier to catch Pokémon that are at a lower level than your own Pokémon.

name: PP Max
description: A medicine that can optimally raise the maximum PP of a single move that has been learned by the target Pokémon.

name: Lum Berry
description: A Berry to be consumed by Pokémon. If a Pokémon holds one, it can recover from any status condition during battle.

name: TM58 [Tailwind]
description: Imported from Shops, Stores & Trash Cans (XY).xlsx; review final in-game description later.

name: Dusk Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that makes it easier to catch wild Pokémon at night or in dark places like caves.

name: Ability Capsule
description: A capsule that allows a Pokémon with two Abilities to switch between these Abilities when it is used.

name: TM85 [Zen Headbutt]
description: Imported from Shops, Stores & Trash Cans (XY).xlsx; review final in-game description later.

name: Fast Ball
description: A Poké Ball that makes it easier to catch Pokémon that are usually very quick to run away.

name: Repeat Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that works especially well on a Pokémon species that has been caught before.

name: Nest Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that becomes more effective the lower the level of the wild Pokémon.

name: Net Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that is more effective when attempting to catch Water- or Bug-type Pokémon.

name: Elixir
description: This medicine can restore 10 PP to each of the moves that have been learned by a Pokémon.

name: Max Elixir
description: This medicine can fully restore the PP of all of the moves that have been learned by a Pokémon.

name: Quick Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that has a more successful catch rate if used at the start of a wild encounter.

name: Heal Ball
description: A remedial Poké Ball that restores the HP of a Pokémon caught with it and eliminates any status conditions.

name: Timer Ball
description: A somewhat different Poké Ball that becomes progressively more effective the more turns that are taken in battle.

name: Luxury Ball
description: A particularly comfortable Poké Ball that makes a wild Pokémon quickly grow friendlier after being caught.

name: PP Up
description: A medicine that can slightly raise the maximum PP of a single move that has been learned by the target Pokémon.

name: Balm Mushroom
description: A rare mushroom that gives off a nice fragrance. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Max Ether
description: This medicine can fully restore the PP of a single selected move that has been learned by a Pokémon.

name: Box Link
description: Imported from Box Link Locations.docx; review final in-game description later.
